allow: Bash(source "AI OS/Codebase/Postgres Query/venv/bin/activate" && python "AI OS/Codebase/Postgres Query/query.py" *)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^source "AI OS/Codebase/Postgres Query/venv/bin/activate" && python "AI OS/Codebase/Postgres Query/query.py" --(schema|sql|csv)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"query-db script auto-allowed"}}' || echo '{}'

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^cd "AI OS/Codebase/obsidian-mine" && venv/bin/python cli.py (explore|mine)( |$)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"mine script auto-allowed"}}' || echo '{}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && echo '{}' && exit 0; b=$(basename "$f"); case "$b" in .env.example) echo '{}' ;; .env|.env.*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked for security"}}' ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac
